description: Leartech preset for Angular applications. Layer on top of default.json — adds groups for Angular framework, leartech npm libs, and the leartech-nginx serving image.

packageRules.description: Auto-merge leartech-nginx image bumps — internal serving sidecar, low risk.
Auto-merge @mikelear/leartech-* npm packages as soon as they're published. Same rationale as go-service: internal libs flow continuously.
Group all @angular/* updates together — they version in lockstep. Manual review (no automerge) because Angular bumps usually need a build verification.
Group lint tooling — eslint, typescript-eslint, angular-eslint move together.
Group test tooling — karma + jasmine ecosystem.
